title: Smoke net counts StationShell sections, not block-type renders
detail: lessons.smoke.test.jsx:38 counts <section id>; StationShell emits the section above {children}, and renderBlock has default:return null — a mis-wired/dropped block case stays green. Fix: mark each block root with data-block-type and assert the observed set covers all 10 types.

title: Slack smoke thresholds (>=3/lesson, >=100 total)
detail: Actuals are 7 and ~128; a partial station loss inside one lesson passes green. Pin exact per-lesson counts and total===128.

title: Lesson content integrity (D2) unprotected by net
detail: Net never inspects rendered text; garbled content preserving station count is invisible. Cheap guard: snapshot each lesson meta.title / first-station text.

title: Dead React default import in 13 files
detail: Unused under automatic JSX runtime (tsserver flags App.jsx:1). Faithful to original, not a regression. Drop React token for lint-clean files.
